step1.heading: Step 1: Select Camera Points
step1.instructions: Click on 4 corners of a rectangular area in the camera view. Start from the top-left corner and go clockwise.

step2.heading: Step 2: Select Floor Plan Points
step2.instructions: Click on the corresponding 4 points on the floor plan grid. Match the same order as the camera points (top-left, top-right, bottom-right, bottom-left).

step3.heading: Step 3: Review Calibration
step3.instructions: Verify that the camera and floor plan points are correctly aligned. The transformation will map positions from the camera view to the floor plan.

complete.heading: Calibration Complete
complete.message: The camera has been successfully calibrated. Position data will now be mapped to the floor plan coordinates.
